LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS WENDY WONG, MASON MCDUFFIE REAL ESTATE, INC FKA PRUDENTIAL'S JOINT MOTION FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY AS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CCP 369.1 IS GRANTED. MASON MCDUFFIE REAL ESTATE INC. FKA PRUDENTIAL CALIFORNIA REALTY AND ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS PRUDENTIAL REALTY OF CALIFORNIA, WENDY WONG, MEREDITH RICHARDSON, LAUREN RICHARDSON, CHRISTOPHER MILLER AND HOLLEY MILLER HAVE MADE A SHOWING THAT MR. ENG IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND THAT THERE IS NOT A REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT MR. ENG WILL PREVAIL IN THE LITIGATION AGAINST THESE DEFENDANTS. ENG HAS REPEATEDLY BEEN FOUND TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, SUCH AS IN THE NOVEMBER 9, 2010 ORDER IN CASE NO. 10-496656, AND OTHER MENTIONED IN THE MOVING PAPERS. ENG MUST FILE A BOND OR SECURITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $44,000 NOT LATER THAN AUGUST 8, 2012 OR ELSE THE COMPLAINT WILL BE DISMISSED AS TO MASON MCDUFFIE REAL ESTATE INC. FKA PRUDENTIAL CALIFORNIA REALTY ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS PRUDENTIAL REALTY OF CALIFORNIA, AND WENDY WONG. ENG MUST FILE A BOND OR SECURITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $44,000 NOT LATER THAN AUGUST 8, 2012 OR ELSE THE COMPLAINT WILL BE DISMISSED AS TO MEREDITH RICHARDSON, LAUREN RICHARDSON, CHRISTOPHER MILLER AND HOLLEY MILLER. THE INTENT OF THIS ORDER IS TO ENSURE THAT FOR ALL DEFENDANTS SECURITY IN THE TOTAL SUM OF $88,000 IS POSTED. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.
ORDER REQUIRING PLAINITFF TO FURNISH SECURITY AS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CCP SECTION 391.1
